title: tanacetum caucasicum
intro: Tanacetum caucasicum, also known as Caucasian tansy or Tanacetum, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Tanacetum caucasicum include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Tanacetum caucasicum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
